case_title: BRENDA PAZ ET AL VS. FREDDY MORATAYA

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,101.00 FILED BY PAZ, BRENDA OROAZO, MARLY AS TO DEFENDANT MORATAYA, FREDDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-13-2018 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAZ, BRENDA OROAZO, MARLY ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
(SC-105) REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY DEFENDANT MORATAYA, FREDDY

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JULY 30, 2018. AFTER THE CASE WAS CALLED AT 9:05 A.M. DEFENDANT FREDDY MORATAYA PRESENT IN PRO PER WITH SPANISH INTERPRETER. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE BY THE PLAINTIFFS AND NO PROOF OF SERVICE. THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. JUDGE PRO TEM ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. NO EXHIBITS DETAINED. (506)
(SC-105)ANSWER TO REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PAZ, BRENDA
ORDER DENYING REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER (SC-105A)

LE, NOT REPORTED (506)
ORDER -CONTINUED TO JULY 30, 2018 AT 8:30AM FOR PLAINTIFF TO AMEND CLAIM
